page: Microsoft Azure M96ds_1_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MDSMediumMemoryv3 family. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs built on the x86_64 architecture with an Intel processor, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 974.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 10.15 GB of RAM per core.

This server includes 410 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments. It does not include any GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, the M96ds_1_v3 offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring large in-memory footprints without the overhead of GPU hardware. It is designed for large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise applications, and heavy transactional workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure M96ds_1_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MDSMediumMemoryv3 family, designed for resource-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by an Intel processor on the x86_64 architecture, this instance provides 96 dedicated vCPUs and 974.0 GB of RAM, translating to 10.15 GB of memory per core. It operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and includes 410 GB of local storage, with support for Premium Storage. The server does not feature integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is optimized for large-scale databases, in-memory data processing, and demanding enterprise applications that require substantial memory capacity and dedicated compute resources.
